zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Lucy於大約1089年在英國坎布利其爾尼受洗時，他的父親Adrian de Lucy26歲，母親Aveline Goth24歲。他與Rohese de Boulogne結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1154年被列為chief justicar of england。他去世於1179年7月14日在英國英格蘭倫敦貝爾維德享年91歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特貝茲利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard de Lucy于大约1089年在英国坎布利其爾尼受洗时，他的父亲Adrian de Lucy26岁，母亲Aveline Goth24岁。他与Rohese de Boulogne结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1154年被列为chief justicar of england。他去世于1179年7月14日在英国英格兰倫敦貝爾維德享年91岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特貝茲利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Lucey  .
French: habitational name from any of various places called Lucy, originally named with the Latin personal name Lucius + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lucey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Maeve, Niall.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Luasaigh, an altered form of Mac Cluasaigh, a Cork name meaning ‘son of Cluasach’, a byname originally denoting someone with large or otherwise noticeable ears (from cluas ‘ear’).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Lucy was christened about 1089, in Thorney, Cambridgeshire, England, his father, Adrian de Lucy, was 26 and his mother, Aveline Goth, was 24. He married Rohese de Boulogne. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. In 1154, his occupation is listed as chief justicar of england. He died on 14 July 1179, in Belvedere, London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 91, and was buried in Bexley, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Lucy a été baptisé environ 1089, à Thorney, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, Adrian de Lucy, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Aveline Goth, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Rohese de Boulogne. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. En 1154, sa profession de son indiquée est chief justicar of england. Il est décédé le 14 juillet 1179, à Belvedere, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 91 ans, et a été enterré à Bexley, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Chipping Ongar, Essex, England: Chipping Ongar, Essex, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Lucy um 1089 in Thorney, Cambridgeshire, England getauft wurde, war sein Vater Adrian de Lucy 26 und seine Mutter Aveline Goth 24. Er hat Rohese de Boulogne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1154 ist sein Beruf als chief justicar of england aufgeführt. Er starb am 14. Juli 1179 im Alter von 91 Jahren in Belvedere, London, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bexley, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Lucy è stato battezzato circa 1089 nel Thorney, Cambridgeshire, England, il suo padre, Adrian de Lucy, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Aveline Goth, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Rohese de Boulogne. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1154, la sua occupazione è indicata come chief justicar of england. Morì il 14 luglio 1179, nel Belvedere, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 91 anni, e fu sepolto a Bexley, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Lucyが約1089年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアソルニーで洗礼を受けた時，父Adrian de Lucyは26歳，母Aveline Gothは24歳であった。Rohese de Boulogneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1154年，職業はchief justicar of englandと記録されている。彼は1179年7月14日にイギリスイギリスロンドンベルベデアで91歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントベクスリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Lucy(이)가 대략 1089년 영국 캄브리지실르 토른이에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그의 아버지 Adrian de Lucy(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Aveline Goth(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Rohese de Boulogne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1154년, 그의 직업은 chief justicar of england이었다. 그는 1179년 7월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 벨브더에서 91세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 브스리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Lucy foi batizado aproximadamente 1089, em Thorney, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Adrian de Lucy, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Aveline Goth, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Rohese de Boulogne. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1154, sua profissão aparece como chief justicar of england. Ele faleceu em 14 de julho de 1179, em Belvedere, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 91 anos, e foi sepultado em Bexley, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Chipping Ongar, Essex, England: Chipping Ongar, Essex, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Lucy был крещен около 1089 г. в местности таурни, камбриджешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Adrian de Lucy было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Aveline Goth, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Rohese de Boulogne. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. В 1154 году он работал по профессии chief justicar of england. Он умер 14 июля 1179 г. в местности белведир, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 91 год и был похоронен в местности бексли, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard de Lucy se bautizó aproximadamente 1089, en Thorney, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Adrian de Lucy, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Aveline Goth, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Rohese de Boulogne. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1154, su ocupación registrada era chief justicar of england. Murió el 14 de julio de 1179, en Belvedere, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 91 años, y fue sepultado en Bexley, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
